zh.title: 艾达币/美元技术分析：震荡偏强上行结构
zh.content:
当前ADA/USD维持震荡偏强结构，价格突破短期均线后延续小级别上行，但整体仍处于低位修复阶段，多头动能逐步释放趋势温和延续中

MACD柱状转正显示短线动能改善，但信号线未完全确认趋势强度，RSI缺失使超买超卖判断有限，需结合量能观察短期仍以震荡为主

下方关键支撑位关注0.1440附近，若跌破可能回测0.1436均线支撑，上方阻力集中在0.1480及0.1500整数关口

操作上建议以低吸高抛为主，未放量突破前避免追高，若回踩0.1440附近可分批布局，多头确认后再考虑加仓控制风险为先策略执行灵活

en.title: Cardano vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
ADA/USD is currently exhibiting a mild bullish bias after recovering from recent consolidation near the 0.144 region. Price action is pressing against short-term highs, indicating a tentative breakout structure. However, momentum remains measured rather than impulsive, suggesting the market is still in a balancing phase between accumulation and distribution. The overall structure favors a gradual upward drift as long as price holds above the short-term moving average support.

The MACD reading at 0.0001078 confirms slight positive momentum, though the lack of a visible signal line limits full confirmation of trend strength. The SMA(20) at 0.143646 acts as a dynamic support level and reinforces the bullish tilt above it. With RSI unavailable, price behavior around recent highs becomes more important, showing controlled strength rather than overbought conditions. Momentum remains fragile but constructive.

Immediate resistance is located at the recent high near 0.1474, which aligns closely with current price action. A clean breakout above this level could open the path toward 0.1500, a psychological barrier. On the downside, initial support sits at 0.1440, followed by stronger structural support at the SMA(20) near 0.1436. A breakdown below this zone would weaken the bullish structure and shift sentiment toward neutral.

Trading conditions favor a cautious bullish strategy, with potential long entries on confirmed breakouts above 0.1474 or pullbacks toward the SMA(20) support zone. Risk management is essential given the thin momentum profile, with stop-loss levels ideally placed below 0.1430 to avoid noise-driven spikes. Short positions are less favorable unless price decisively fails at resistance, signaling rejection and renewed downside pressure.
